text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have Satono Diamond take a run around town
today for a change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What a crowd... I wonder if there's an event going
on.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...No, I can't go. I'm in the middle of training, so I
have to get back to the academy right away...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me. Could I get by you, please?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The "World Claw Machine Tournament"? Are all
these people here to watch?

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Hello there! Are you here to participate or to
watch?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Satono Diamond ends up missing
training... in exchange for a very large trophy.
